title: Beta Revival
description: New features, yet a familiar feel remains.
body:
The core mods of the pack are Let’s Do Series (Let’s Do Bakery, Let’s Do Farm, etc.), which adds tons of new farming opportunities. What makes this pack unique is that I’ve also brought back some elements from the beta days! For example, I’ve reintroduced fog, which used to give the game a more mysterious feel, and tweaked the lighting system to be more atmospheric—just like it used to be.

The modpack is still in its early stages, but I’d love to hear your thoughts! What old or new features would you like to see in a pack like this?
